_note: Hand-verified truth for ONE real document. Read it with your eyes and fill the CORRECT values. Latin = as printed in MRZ / official transliteration; Cyrillic = as printed. Dates as YYYY-MM-DD. Leave a field empty ('') if it is not present on the document. The benchmark scores each reader (old TPS / old Translation / MRZ / new Core) against this; metric = critical_wrong_count must be 0.
